entity.summary: On-chain trading protocol developed by Bancor that provides automated order strategies and orderbook-like trading features. HEI treats network-specific Carbon rows as deployments of this parent protocol rather than separate exchange entities.
entity.notes: Celo, Ethereum, Sei, and other network-specific source rows are collapsed under this parent entity. Launch date remains null because this review did not recover a sufficiently strong launch marker.

evidence.title: Carbon DeFi official website
evidence.notes: Official site presents active on-chain trading features, links to the application, and identifies Carbon DeFi as a Bancor product.

evidence.title: Carbon DeFi protocol profile
evidence.notes: Protocol directory reference used to corroborate the DEX candidate and multi-network parent identity.
